context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI changes from iteration 39 are working correctly. Key points: (1) Text tool completely removed, (2) Select tool is now default active, (3) Marking/Highlighter have distinct icons (Underline vs Highlighter lucide icons), (4) Both AIs show auto document viewing messages, (5) Judge Mini photo upload button removed from input area, (6) Deep Analysis 'Belgeye Ekle' button exists (shows post-analysis). Tested with Pro user account.
